name: Workers comp vs suing coworker in West Valley City?

mainEntity.name: Workers comp vs suing coworker in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Comp for employer; sue coworker only if gross negligence outside scope.**[3]

Fellow servant immunity bars most coworker suits; comp exclusive.

- Intentional assault exception.
- Third-party stronger.[2]

Comp faster, guaranteed if eligible.
